name: Baked Apples
recipeInstructions:
Many different kinds of apples, such as Mackintosh, Rome Beauty, Gravenstein, etc., can be used in this recipe. Store leftover baked apples in the refrigerator for an easy snack or quick breakfast.
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Core the apples, leaving a half-inch base, and place them in a baking dish. Sprinkle each apple with one-fourth teaspoon of cinnamon, one whole clove, a dash of nutmeg, and two teaspoons of apple juice concentrate. Pour water around the apples. Add the remaining spices to the water. Bake for 1 to 1 and a half hours, until the apples are soft. Serve warm or cold.
